resources

Things you can use, not just read — sometimes an ebook, sometimes a small web app, sometimes a video.

take one ↓
web app Pomodoro Timer A minimal, distraction-free pomodoro timer. No account, no settings rabbit hole — just press start and work. ebook The Shipping Checklist A short, practical ebook: 27 checkpoints I run through before launching anything — from side project to production app.
